title: Loot Beams Backport
description: Backport of shiroroku's Loot Beams to 1.7.10
body:
## Loot Beams Backport
[![logo](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https://dreamfinity.org/badge.php&label=Ported)](https://dreamfinity.org)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/157892343163387904?color=5865F2&label=Discord)](https://discord.gg/weChv5cF)  

This is a backport of shiroroku's [Loot Beams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-beams) to minecraft 1.7.10  
For proper usage it requires [HookLib](https://github.com/Aizistral-Studios/HookLib-Ultimate/releases/download/v1.7.10-1.0-ultimate/HookLibUltimate-1.0-universal.jar) by Gloomy Folken OR you can download mod with embedded lib  
It supports both Minecraft rarity system & Minecraft color codes  
### Example:  
![Example](https://dreamfinity.org/content/gifs/lootbeamsbackport_30.gif)
